protein_name: Ligand for members of the frizzled family of seven transmembrane receptors. Probable developmental protein. May be a signaling molecule which affects the development of discrete regions of tissues. Is likely to signal over only few cell diameters. Belongs to the Wnt family. Expressed in fetal lung, kidney, adult heart, liver, skeletal muscle, and pancreas. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
